dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: We wish you a successful day in your exams.

entry.loadError: Could not load exam entry data
entry.empty: No data found for this exam.
entry.subject: Subject
entry.instructionsEmpty: No additional instructions for this exam.
instructionsList: Stay within the camera frame throughout the exam.
Do not use external tools or books unless stated otherwise.
The session is recorded for academic monitoring purposes.
Leaving the exam window or opening new tabs may cancel your attempt.
Ensure sufficient room lighting for face verification.
If you face a technical issue, contact support immediately.
entry.consent: I acknowledge that I have read and understood all the rules above
entry.cameraWaiting: Allow camera access to show your video and verify your presence
entry.facePending: Waiting for you in front of the camera
entry.proctoringOffHint: This exam does not require a camera check before starting.
entry.startHint: The button enables after you agree to the rules and pass the camera check (if required).
entry.cannotStart: You cannot start this exam right now according to backend rules (start not allowed).
entry.blockedMaxAttempts: Not allowed — you have used all permitted attempts ({{count}}). You cannot enter this exam again.
entry.blockedAlreadyCompleted: Not allowed — you already used your attempt for this exam and cannot re-enter.

placeholder.comingSoon: Coming soon — ready for backend integration

exams.title: Exams
exams.description: You will find all your available, upcoming, and completed exams here.

results.title: Results
results.description: This page will show your exam results and score details.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Student account settings and preferences will be available here soon.

settingsPage.title: Settings and preferences
settingsPage.subtitle: Control your learning environment, notifications, and privacy.

interface.title: Interface settings
interface.subtitle: Customize QUIZHUB look and feel.
interface.languageHint: Choose the language you want to use in the interface.
interface.themeHint: Switch theme based on your preference.
interface.contrastHint: Boosts text readability only (WCAG AA target ≈ 4.5:1) without changing card borders.
interface.fontSizeHint: Scales page content up to 200% without breaking the sidebar chrome, per text-resize guidance.

privacy.title: Privacy and security
privacy.subtitle: Control your data and digital rights.
privacy.changePasswordHint: You will need your current password, then choose a new one.
privacy.logoutHint: You will need to sign in again.
privacy.deleteHint: This will delete all your files and exams and cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? You will not be able to sign in after this.
privacy.deleteRecoveryNote: This is a soft delete: your data remains recoverable for about one month. Only a Super Admin can restore the account within that window.
privacy.deleteEmailHint: Type your account email exactly to enable the delete button.
privacy.deleteEmailMismatch: The email you entered does not match your account email.

register.title: Welcome to QuizHub
register.subtitle: Fill in your account details to join an educational space
register.joinCodeSubtitle: Enter the join code provided by your institution

attempt.title: Exam
attempt.noBackWarning: You cannot return to previous questions. Once you move to the next question, your current answer will be locked.
attempt.answerRequired: Answer the current question before continuing
attempt.backDisabled: Going back is not allowed in this exam
attempt.requireAllAnswers: All questions must be answered before submit
attempt.requireAllAnswersRemaining: Cannot submit — {{count}} question(s) still unanswered. Answer all questions first.
attempt.markedRemaining: Cannot submit — {{count}} question(s) are still marked. Review them and remove the mark first.
attempt.markHint: A mark reminds you to revisit a question (answered or not). Remove all marks before submitting.
attempt.submitConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to submit? You will not be able to edit your answers afterward.

results.readyDescription: Your answers were processed. You can review results once grading is complete.
results.pendingDescription: Your attempt was submitted. Some answers need manual grading, and you will be notified when the result is approved.

performance.title: Academic results dashboard
performance.subtitle: Track your academic progress, analyze performance, and identify subjects that need reinforcement.
performance.exportUnavailable: Results export is not available yet — waiting for the backend API.
